scripts.build: npm run build:server && npm run build:web
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck:server && npm run typecheck:web
scripts.test:web: node --test --import tsx web/test/chat-workflow.test.ts web/test/matrix-gates.test.ts web/test/matrix-api.test.ts web/test/github-auth.test.ts web/test/workspace-state.test.ts web/test/shell-view-model.test.ts web/test/approval-primitives.test.ts web/test/github-workspace.test.ts web/test/matrix-workspace.test.ts web/test/review-workspace.test.ts
scripts.test: npm run test:server && npm run test:web
